value.found_quote: Preview release 2.0.1 [2] / 19 May 2026 ; 32 days ago (19 May 2026)
value.rationale: The page describes Google Antigravity, a Google-developed software platform, and references a "Preview release 2.0.1" dated 19 May 2026, with a citation linking to a blog post titled "introducing-google-antigravity-2-0". This substantiates that Google offers Antigravity 2.0, currently in preview/free preview status.
